name: Autologous pro-regenerative cell conditioned media
summary: Autologous pro-regenerative cell-derived conditioned media is normalized for a single-arm multimodal healthy-aging pilot that combined lifestyle, supplements, and intravenous conditioned-media infusions.
mechanism_summary: Uses autologous peripheral-blood-derived pro-regenerative cells cultured ex vivo to produce a cell-free conditioned-media mixture that may contain soluble factors and extracellular vesicles, but the current human signal is confounded by a broader lifestyle and supplement protocol.

open_questions: Whether conditioned media contributed independently from lifestyle optimization, supplements, regression to the mean, expectancy effects, or measurement variability.
Whether extracellular-vesicle cargo, soluble factors, dose, route, and potency can be characterized enough to compare this preparation with other secretome products.
Whether larger controlled trials can replicate biological-age marker movement and connect it to durable functional outcomes.
